title: About — Manjari Kannan
text:
About Me
I am a graduate student at Boston University pursuing my MS in Applied Business Analytics. I previously earned my BBA from the UMass Amherst Isenberg School of Management with a concentration in Information Systems and an IT minor.
I am deeply interested in how data and analytics can drive smarter marketing and business decisions. My academic foundation combines quantitative methods with strategic thinking, giving me a unique perspective at the intersection of technology and business.

title: About — Manjari Kannan
text:
Career Goals
I aspire to build a career at the intersection of data strategy and marketing intelligence, helping organizations leverage their data assets to create competitive advantage. My goal is to contribute to teams that are transforming how businesses understand their customers and optimize their decisions through analytics.
I’m particularly drawn to roles in business intelligence, data strategy, and marketing analytics — where analytical rigor meets creative problem-solving. I’m actively seeking opportunities that allow me to apply my technical skills to real-world business challenges.

title: Projects — Manjari Kannan
text:
Portfolio

Projects
A showcase of my data analytics and business intelligence work







☁️


Cloud Analytics Lab
Configured an end-to-end cloud analytics pipeline on AWS EC2, demonstrating data ingestion with PySpark, storage in S3, and interactive visualization. Focused on scalable architecture and fully reproducible workflows deployed via Linux.

AWS EC2 Python PySpark S3 Linux


GitHub





📉


Customer Churn Predictor
Built a machine learning classification model to identify at-risk customers with 88% accuracy. Implemented SHAP values for model explainability and created an interactive Tableau dashboard to surface insights for non-technical stakeholders.

Python scikit-learn SHAP Tableau SQL


GitHub





📊


Marketing Mix Model
Developed a statistical model to analyze the ROI of marketing channels using regression analysis and time-series decomposition. Results enabled a 15% reallocation of budget toward higher-performing channels.

Python R Power BI Excel Alteryx


GitHub





📋


Sales Dashboard
Designed a comprehensive sales performance dashboard in Power BI integrating data from SAP ERP and CRM systems. Automated weekly reporting reduced manual effort by 6 hours per week for the sales team.

Power BI SAP ERP SQL DAX Excel
